svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="System Architecture" id="6E7PyVLIHRlsrWh_Yl94"> <mxGraphModel dx="1178" dy="693" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-87" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Lights, Fans, Discord — System Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="700" x="480" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-88" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="1. Simulated Device Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="260" x="40" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-89" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="① Device Simulator
(asyncio background task)

• 15 devices (2 fans + 3 lights x 3 rooms)
• Occupancy-based on/off model
• Simulated clock (adjustable speed)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="260" x="40" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-90" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="② Backend Updates Shared Device State
(single source of truth)

status | watts | room
last_changed | on_since" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="260" x="40" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-91" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-89" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;elbow=vertical;startArrow=none;strokeColor=#1565C0;strokeWidth=3;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-90"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-92" connectable="0" parent="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-91" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1565C0;" value="updates state
every tick" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-93" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="2. Backend (FastAPI) — Single Source of Truth" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="320" x="380" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-94" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="320" x="380" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-95" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="REST API
/api/status /api/room/{name}
/api/usage /api/alerts" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="270" x="405" y="165" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-96" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="③ Backend Broadcasts via WebSocket
/ws/dashboard → all clients" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="270" x="405" y="235" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-97" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Alert Engine
• After-hours check (9AM-5PM)
• >2hr continuous-on check
• Runs on every sim tick" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="270" x="405" y="295" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-98" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Energy Accumulator
(integrates W over time -> kWh)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="270" x="405" y="375" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-99" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-90" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;strokeColor=#666666;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-95"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-100" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-90" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;strokeColor=#1565C0;strokeWidth=3;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-96"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-101" connectable="0" parent="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-100" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1565C0;" value="on change" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-102" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-90" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;strokeColor=#666666;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-97"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-103" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-90" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;strokeColor=#666666;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-98"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-104" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="3. Consumers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="320" x="780" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-105" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="④ Dashboard Updates Immediately
(single HTML/CSS/JS page)

• Live Device Status Panel
• Live Power Meter (total + per-room)
• Active Alerts Panel
• Office floor-plan (SVG, animated)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="320" x="780" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-106" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="Discord Bot (discord.py)

!status !room <name> !usage
+ proactive alert posts
(calls REST API, never caches)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="320" x="780" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-107" edge="1" name="wsedge" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-96" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;strokeColor=#1565C0;strokeWidth=3;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-105"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-108" connectable="0" parent="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-107" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1565C0;" value="instant update
(no refresh)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-109" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-95" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;strokeColor=#666666;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-106"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="740" y="195" /> <mxPoint x="740" y="400" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-110" connectable="0" parent="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-109" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666666;" value="REST GET
(on command)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-111" edge="1" parent="1" source="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-97" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=0.15;exitY=1;entryX=0.15;entryY=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#b85450;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-106"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="415" y="490" /> <mxPoint x="795" y="490" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-112" connectable="0" parent="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-111" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;" value="proactive push (bonus)

User" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="220" x="1160" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-124" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="The Boss
(browser + Discord client)

Sees identical live state
in both interfaces" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="220" x="1160" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-125" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;startArrow=none;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.7;" target="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-124"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-127" connectable="0" parent="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-126" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666666;" value="!command" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.3" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="-10" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-128" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;dashed=1;" value="Legend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="500" x="40" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-129" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;align=left;fontColor=#1565C0;" value="→ bold blue = realtime path: simulator → shared state → WebSocket broadcast → dashboard" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="650" x="60" y="498" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-130" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;align=left;fontColor=#666666;" value="→ solid gray = on-demand read (REST API, alert engine, energy accumulator)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="650" x="60" y="518" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-131" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;align=left;fontColor=#b85450;" value="→ dashed red = proactive alert push to Discord (bonus)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="650" x="60" y="538" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-132" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;align=left;fontColor=#999999;" value="→ dashed gray = LLM fallback trigger (provider failure, timeout, or quota exceeded)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="650" x="60" y="558" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zqjfqhM5G1VIXV-8_MA6-133" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;align=left;" value="Backend is the single source of truth: both the Web UI and the Discord Bot
read from the same REST/WebSocket API. Neither interface stores its own copy of state." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="650" x="60" y="582" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 185px; margin-left: 1px;

div.div:
① Device Simulator
(asyncio background task)
• 15 devices (2 fans + 3 lights x 3 rooms)
• Occupancy-based on/off model
• Simulated clock (adjustable speed)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 335px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② Backend Updates Shared Device State
(single source of truth)
status | watts | room
last_changed | on_since

div.div:
③ Backend Broadcasts via WebSocket
/ws/dashboard → all clients

div.div:
Backend is the single source of truth: both the Web UI and the Discord Bot
read from the same REST/WebSocket API. Neither interface stores its own copy of state.
